data.title: .test-index: leading whitespace in check-skill-refs.sh test pattern entry
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: The .test-index entry for check-skill-refs.sh has a leading space before the test pattern, which may cause test gate fuzzy matching to fail silently.
File: .test-index
Category: hygiene
